exercises.title: Nested If: Admin Panel
exercises.instructions: If the user is logged in AND also an admin, print 'Admin panel'. Use nested ifs (not &&).
exercises.hints: Place the second if inside the first if's block

exercises.title: Nested If: Positive and Even
exercises.instructions: Given num = 8, first check that num is positive; if so, check whether it is even and print 'Positive even' or 'Positive odd'.
exercises.hints: The inner if/else only runs when the outer condition is true

exercises.title: Nested If: Login Flow
exercises.instructions: Given username = 'admin' and password = 'secret', print 'Welcome admin' only when both match. Otherwise print 'Access denied'. Use nested ifs.
exercises.hints: Check username in the outer if, then password in the inner if

exercises.title: Nested If: Ticket Pricing
exercises.instructions: Given age = 30 and isMember = true, print 10 if adult member, 15 if adult non-member, 5 if child member, 7 if child non-member. 'Adult' means age >= 18.
exercises.hints: Outer if splits adult/child, inner if splits member/non-member

exercises.title: Nested If: Triangle Classifier
exercises.instructions: Given a = 5, b = 5, c = 5, first check the triangle is valid (a+b>c and a+c>b and b+c>a). If valid, classify it as 'Equilateral', 'Isosceles', or 'Scalene' with nested ifs.
exercises.hints: The innermost if handles Isosceles vs Scalene

exercises.title: Nested If: Leap Year
exercises.instructions: Given year = 2000, print 'Leap' if it is a leap year, otherwise 'Not leap'. Rule: divisible by 4; if divisible by 100 it must also be divisible by 400. Use nested ifs (no &&).
exercises.hints: Three levels of nesting handle the /4, /100, /400 rules in order

exercises.title: Leap Year
exercises.instructions:
Given year = 2024, determine if it is a leap year.
A year is a leap year if:
- It is divisible by 4 AND
- It is NOT divisible by 100, OR it IS divisible by 400

Print "Leap year" or "Not a leap year".
exercises.hints: Use the % (modulo) operator. Combine conditions with && and ||.

exercises.title: What is the JavaScript ternary (conditional) expression syntax?

answers.text: if condition then valueIfTrue else valueIfFalse
